content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) [record_id]
,[input_token]
,[udf_1]
,[udf_2]
,[udf_3]
,[deceased_match_indicator]
,[date_of_death]
,[verified_or_proof_code]
,[deceased_source]
,[deceased_county]
,[deceased_state]
,[confidence_score]
 FROM [customer].[incr_mortality_t]


 ALTER TABLE [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_t] DROP COLUMN [udf_3];
GO
